'''Rutanians''' were the native [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]]. Their species had an offshoot called the [[Senali (species)|Senali]] who inhabited Rutan's own [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Senali]]. The rivalry between the two species was provoked by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] into war, leaving both Rutan and Senali weak and vulnerable to invasion.

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The appearance of the Rutanians is based on [[Loje Nella/Legends|Loje Nella]], an intelligent [[cliffborer worm]].
